testcase.name: G5 desk-free QA assist (admin) › desktop route sanity + desk fallback hidden by default
G5 desk-free QA assist (admin) › mobile viewport route sanity (representative workbench/detail pages)
G5 desk-free QA assist (restricted role) › Agent runtime capability payload disables finance/communication write actions
G5 desk-free QA assist (restricted role) › Agent UI hides communication/finance quick actions

failure.message: g5-desk-free-qa-assist.spec.js:203:3 Agent UI hides communication/finance quick actions

testcase.failure:
g5-desk-free-qa-assist.spec.js:203:3 › G5 desk-free QA assist (restricted role) › Agent UI hides communication/finance quick actions
Error: expect(locator).toHaveCount(expected) failed
Locator: getByRole('button', { name: /Hizli Iletisim|Quick Message/i }) Expected: 0 Received: 1 Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveCount" with timeout 10000ms - waiting for getByRole('button', { name: /Hizli Iletisim|Quick Message/i }) 13 × locator resolved to 1 element - unexpected value "1"
209 | 210 | await gotoRoute(page, "/at/communication"); > 211 | await expect(page.getByRole("button", { name: /Hizli Iletisim|Quick Message/i })).toHaveCount(0); | ^ 212 | await expect(page.getByRole("button", { name: /Dagitimi Calistir|Run Dispatch/i })).toHaveCount(0); 213 | await expect(page.locator(".at-table")).toBeVisible(); 214 | at C:\Users\Aykut\Documents\GitHub\acentem_takipte\frontend\tests\e2e\g5-desk-free-qa-assist.spec.js:211:87

testcase.name: G5 desk-free QA assist (restricted role) › Agent backend write endpoints are permission denied
